text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Yeah, I can't shake this feeling. Is Fine
Motion really okay?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I've got no idea what the use of worrying is. Let's
just cheer her on. I'm sure our feelings will reach
her.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Whether they reach her or not, she's got her work
cut out for her.
What will you do, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, I can't sit still!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I don't wow everyone today, how am I going to
stay in their hearts?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It won't be good enough to just run as usual,
right? Maybe I should try being more reckless...
like running all over the place!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. I would never actually do anything to
besmirch the race!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I just can't think of anything. What should I
do...
choice_data_list: Just do what you've been doing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're telling me to just enjoy the race like
always?
choice_data_list: Just have as much fun as you can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just by enjoying herself, Fine Motion has
captured the hearts of countless fans and inspired
other Umamusume to dream big.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's already made a huge impact, so the only
thing she really needs to change is her
mindset—to something totally opposite of simply
wishing for things to never end.
choice_data_list:
Hope and wish that everyone always remembers
you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, that's an interesting way to look at it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then perhaps I'll give it a try—with a prayer, that
is.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Please... carve the image of me running into
everyone's hearts!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
With the same intensity that a ramen chef carves
chashu pork!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Like, HI-YAH!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Uh, F-Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, did I startle you? I've just gotten so
reenergized.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've got a different flavor today. I hope you enjoy
it, Rob Roy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...!
I see!
